englishDefinitions: to involve me in this situation, especially unwillingly
to pull me into a problem or conflict
persianTranslation: من را وارد این ماجرا کردن
من را درگیر این موضوع کردن
من را به زور وارد این قضیه کردن
examples: Don't suck me into this argument.
I don't want you to suck me into this mess.
She felt like her friends were trying to suck her into their drama.
